index.description: Convert spec into deployed, working artefact. Output is a thing users can use. Feature delivery, MVP launches, content production, deploys, releases, prod cutover.

playbook.summary: "Blind-running agent → fully observed: per-step OTEL traces, eval-in-prod sampling, drift detection, alerting, on-call runbook."
Agent with file-read / web-fetch / MCP tools → survives indirect-prompt-injection red-team without exfiltrating data, escalating permissions, or breaking refusal policy.

"Agentic AI feature MVP to GA. Take a tool-using agent idea (booking assistant, codebase helper, research agent) from spike to GA: pick framework, design tool surface + memory, guardrails, eval for..."

AI-assisted infra review gate (Dockerfile + Helm + Terraform). Three checklists wired as CI gates that catch the canonical AI-coder mistakes (root user, latest tag, missing limits, missing security...
Designer is asked to add an AI feature; ends with a vetted UX pattern + a11y + trust/disclosure framing + override path + measurable trust metrics.
An AI-authored Dockerfile, GHA workflow, or Terraform module passes hardening review (non-root user, pinned digests, no secrets in env, healthcheck, minimal layers) before it enters main.
"Stand up an AI-native product surface (new feature or new product) end-to-end: agentic capability shape, eval framework, safety + explainability, rollout, and steady-state operating model."
Solo founder ships a feature in a clean spec → AI-implement → review → ship cycle that does NOT degrade into vibe-coded breakage.
AI-implemented feature with risk of vibe-coded breakage → repeatable per-feature spec→AI→review→ship loop without quality regression.

"Build a production eval harness from scratch. Stand up the team's first real eval harness so model + prompt changes stop being vibes-based: golden test set, automated metrics, LLM-as-judge with rub..."
Outsource agency picks up an existing app or marketing surface, runs targeted research, redesigns priority flows, validates, ships a vendor-friendly handoff with measurable KPIs.
Ship a regulated-domain feature → merged PR + evidence pack + traceable to control catalogue + AI agent did not invent unsafe patterns.

Compliance-Grade Feature Delivery (FinTech / HIPAA / PCI) — Pick up a client-mandated feature in a regulated domain (FinTech payment flow, HIPAA PHI handling, PCI cardholder data path) and ship it ...
Five fragmented handoffs → one living artifact carries a feature through PM / Architect / Dev / QA / DevOps with DoR/DoD gates.

A feature moves through 5 roles with a single living artifact (spec + design + test-plan + runbook). Each role inherits prior context and emits a delta. Handoffs blocked if Definition-of-Ready not met
Empty editor at 9am → one feature slice merged to staging by EOD.
"One feature slice shipped to staging in a single focused day: spec written, code generated against acceptance, self-review pass complete, PR merged, deploy verified."
Feature lives on staging → safe push to prod with rollback ready and post-deploy verified.
"Safe push to prod with rollback ready: CI green, smoke pass on staging, feature-flagged where risky, deploy script run, post-deploy health verified, rollback path proven."
Latest main on staging, smoke suite green, manual happy-path verified on the 3 most-trafficked surfaces, deploy notes posted. Production deploy unblocked.
Team owns or inherits a design system; ends with a self-sustaining loop where token edits propagate to Figma + Storybook + production, with governance and breaking-change process.
"One component shipped: spec updated, tokens aligned, variants regression-checked, code-connect map refreshed, changelog entry posted."
From an opportunity hypothesis through evidence-backed problem framing, MVP scoping, build, launch, and first iteration. Ends when MVP is in production with success metrics tracked.

"Embed RAG into an existing product. Ship a tier-1 RAG feature (retrieval-grounded answers over the product's own corpus) from kickoff to GA: ingestion pipeline live, chunking + embeddings tuned, hy..."
No eval harness → CI-integrated eval harness gating every prompt/tool/model change with regression score, adversarial pack, cost-per-success budget.
Agent builder wires faion CLI as structured methodology lookup → no markdown parsing, emits faion-citation tokens.
No internal RAG → faion methodology corpus embedded as reasoning prior for an in-house vertical agent with ingestion, retrieval, eval, governance.
"Outsource dev takes a client ticket from AC to tagged release on the client's repo, inside the client's conventions, review, and audit trail."
Engineer kicks off a small SFT / LoRA / DPO job (OpenAI or local), monitors training, runs holdout eval, decides keep or trash.

First 14 days on a new foreign-client multi-month engagement → legal posture set, comms cadence agreed, dev env provisioned, AI agent constrained → first client-visible PR merged inside client conv...

"Foreign-client project kickoff (2 weeks) — Daria joins a brand-new engagement for a US/EU/UK/AU client. By end of week 2 she has: signed SoW, validated requirements baseline, ratified architecture ..."
"Day-0 production platform stood up for a new product line: VPC + k8s cluster, GitOps-driven CI/CD, baseline observability (logs/metrics), centralized secrets, on-call rotation in place."
In-house dev or small squad takes a greenfield service from zero to first user-facing deploy with own conventions, infra, and observability.
Agent with file-read / web-fetch / MCP tools survives an indirect-prompt-injection red-team suite without exfiltrating data, escalating permissions, or violating refusal policy.
A service is shipped from a vetted image tag to staging then production via Helm with values diff reviewed, image SBOM verified, and rollback command pre-staged.

Solo founder takes one raw idea from notebook to a paid landing page + working MVP with first 5 paying users; exit when a written go/no-go decision is in hand backed by problem evidence, scoped spe...
Feature or release ships with the launch-readiness checklist green, comms drafted, metrics instrumented, and a rollback path documented.

"Major release QA cycle: regression + smoke + UAT. Done when: a frozen release candidate has passed the full regression matrix, smoke + canary checks green on prod-like env, UAT signed off by named..."

Agent builder wires faion CLI as a structured methodology lookup inside their agent (RAG-as-a-service / SDR / code-review bot) without parsing human-readable markdown, and emits faion-citation toke...
"Embed the faion knowledge base as a reasoning prior for an in-house vertical agent: ingestion, chunking, retrieval, reranking, eval, plus governance / licence / drift hygiene."
New provider/model dropped → onboard as routable target without changing call sites.
Multi-machine senior gets a new engagement → both machines productive on client stack within a half-day, no credential leakage between engagements.

New-project machine setup (laptop + desktop) — Multi-machine senior (work laptop, home desktop, occasionally a client-issued VDI) gets a new outsource engagement and needs both machines productive ...
"Production agent goes from blind-running to fully observed: per-step OTEL traces, eval-in-prod sampling, drift detection on inputs/outputs/costs, alerting, and an on-call runbook."

"Greenfield or replacement observability platform delivered end-to-end across the org: structured logging, metrics, distributed traces, dashboards-as-code, SLOs with error budgets, sane alert routing."

"Performance + load test program rollout. Done when: each critical user journey has documented SLOs + perf budgets, a repeatable load profile per environment, CI perf-smoke gate on critical paths, w..."

A project closes successfully → add a case study to portfolio site within 2 weeks while context is fresh. Done = published case study with metrics, client quote (if NDA permits), and shareable link...

Portfolio site update with new case study — A project closes successfully → add a case study to portfolio site within 2 weeks while context is fresh. Done = published case study with metrics, clien...
MVP that works on localhost → MVP that survives paying customers without a co-founder/SRE.
Take an MVP that works on localhost and make it survive paying customers without a co-founder/SRE.

Get a 2–3 person agency to a state where it is sellable to a strategic buyer, an acqui-hirer, or transferable to a manager-operator within 6–12 months. Even if not selling, the same prep removes fo...
New agent builder → CI-runnable eval harness with golden trajectories, behavioral evals, judge rubrics, drift signal in week 1.

"Productize a recurring engagement into a fixed-scope offer — Take one repeatedly-sold engagement (e.g. 'Stripe integration audit', 'Next.js perf pass', 'CI pipeline setup') and convert it into a na..."
Recurring custom engagement to named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer.
Take a recurring custom engagement and convert it into a named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer.
Recurring custom engagement to fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with landing page, intake form, delivery SOP.

"Take one repeatedly-sold engagement (e.g. 'Stripe integration audit', 'Next.js perf pass', 'CI pipeline setup') and convert it into a named, fixed-price productized service with a public landing pa..."
Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.
Convert one repeated client problem into a fixed-price, fixed-scope offer with a landing page, a booking flow, and 3 paid pilots — moving the freelancer from per-hour to per-outcome billing.
Signed SOW to delivered project with measured margin, NPS, and a retainer-or-referral conversation booked.

"A signed SOW becomes a delivered project: kickoff, requirements baseline, delivery in waves, change-controlled scope, final acceptance, retainer-or-referral conversation. Net margin and NPS measured."
From signed SOW to first demo-able increment landed in client UAT, with charter, baselined plan, risk register, RACI, comms cadence, and burn-up trend all live.
From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty...
From signed SOW to client-accepted final deliverable, with the freelancer running solo across discovery, build, and ship — no scope creep, weekly invoices paid on time, written handover + warranty...
From a qualified-yes discovery, produce a short proposal (1-3 pages) the client can sign within a week. Done = proposal sent, follow-up cadence scheduled, win/loss reason recorded.
"Release-candidate smoke pack. Pre-deploy gate: run a small, fast, high-signal smoke pack against the RC and produce a go/no-go in writing."

One product bet travels from approved RFC to live production behind feature flag with telemetry + on-call ready. All handoffs (PM brief → BA reqs → Architect design → Dev implementation → QA verifi...
Approved RFC → live production behind a feature flag with telemetry, runbook, and post-launch review scheduled.

"Security testing program rollout. Done when: SAST + DAST + SCA + secrets scan wired as CI gates, dependency inventory + SBOM produced per build, threat-model refreshed for top services, OWASP-mappe..."

Ship a QA program for an AI-powered product. From zero, build the QA discipline for a product whose core value is an LLM/RAG/agent feature — eval sets, hallucination + safety tests, regression gate...
New agent builder has a CI-runnable eval harness with golden trajectories, behavioral evals, judge rubrics, and a drift signal that fires before users see regressions.
From zero to a CI-integrated eval harness that gates every prompt/tool/model change with a regression score, an adversarial pack, a cost-per-success budget, and trajectory-level OTEL traces.
One-line tweeted hypothesis → Gumroad/Stripe-collected first paying customer in 21 days.
From a one-line tweeted hypothesis to a Gumroad/Stripe-collected first paying customer, with all build/marketing/ship steps audience-driven and lean.
"Greenfield obs stack chosen, deployed, and instrumented for one reference service; cardinality/cost guardrails set; team can answer 'what broke and where' from a single Grafana entry point."
Blank repo on Monday → vertical agent with paying customer-zero workload on production, eval harness, observability, drift detection, rollback button.

Single-vertical agent (e.g. AI SDR, code-review bot, support triage) goes from blank repo to a paying customer-zero workload on production traffic, with eval harness, observability, drift detection...
